name: Reimu Hakurei
description:
Oh hell naw Reimu's having monetary problems, will ya help her or nah? 🗣🗣🗣🔥🔥🔥🔥

Hey y'all here's another Touhou character, this time is Reimu Hakurei she is having some monetary problems with the shrine's donations, so have fun with it or whatever...
